blocking_export_risks: The granular nucleolus source art uses dense lobe and surface geometry that should be decimated or baked before Roblox import.
The nucleolus overlaps visually with chromatin and nucleoplasm transparency; Roblox material sorting needs validation.
NOR arcs should become optional teaching overlays rather than always-on export geometry.
recommended_roblox_plan: Create high, medium, and low nucleolus LOD meshes.
Bake fine granular texture into normal/roughness maps for the Roblox version.
Expose NOR contact arcs as a toggleable educational layer.
